title: Fix Open-in-PMM deep link for PMM 3.x (was PMM 2.x guess)
originDiscussion: v0.4.5 deploy to Rocky 234 — external PMM panel populated with 13+ services (PMM 3 API path fix from v0.4.5 worked), but clicking the per-row 'Open in PMM' link landed on PMM's Page Not Found.
rootCause: pmmInventoryHref() was hardcoded to /graph/inventory/services/<id> (a guess at the PMM 2.x URL pattern). PMM 3.x uses /inventory/services/<id> — its SPA route is mounted directly under the PMM origin, NOT under Grafana's /graph prefix. curl probe confirmed: /graph/inventory/services/<id> returns 404 (Grafana doesn't know it), /inventory/services/<id> returns 401 (PMM route exists, needs browser cookie session — which it has in the operator's tab).
fix: One-line change in apps/web/src/routes/databases/external-pmm-section.tsx — pmmInventoryHref() now generates ${pmmUrl}/inventory/services/<id>.
